summary: Comprehensive testing of shipping progress bar in Food Cart (FoodCartPage.js) and Product Cart (CartPage.js). ALL FEATURES PASS. The shipping progress bar correctly fills when adding products, turns green when reaching threshold, and decreases when removing products.

feature_1_progress_bar_fills.result: Orange progress bar shows 50% with text 'أضف 25,000 ل.س للتوصيل المجاني'

feature_2_green_at_threshold.result: Green bar with '🎉 مبروك! حصلت على توصيل مجاني' and delivery fee shows 'مجاني ✓'

feature_3_decrease_on_removal.result: Bar correctly reverts from green 100% to orange 50%

feature_4_city_mismatch_alert.test: User from Aleppo ordering from Damascus store
feature_4_city_mismatch_alert.result: Yellow alert shows 'ملاحظة: أنت في حلب والمتجر في دمشق. التوصيل المجاني غير متاح.'

feature_1_progress_bar_fills.result: Orange progress bar shows 27% with remaining amount for free shipping

feature_2_green_at_threshold.result: Green bar at 100% with '🎉 شحن مجاني!' and total shipping shows 'مجاني ✓'

feature_3_decrease_on_removal.test: Remove product to reduce cart to 81,875 ل.س
feature_3_decrease_on_removal.result: Bar correctly changes from green 100% to orange 55%

feature_4_per_seller_shipping.test: Each seller shows separate shipping progress bar
feature_4_per_seller_shipping.result: Per-seller shipping bars with individual progress and totals

critical_code_review_comments: FoodCartPage.js (lines 518-558): Shipping bar implementation is correct with proper percentage calculation and color transitions
CartPage.js (lines 365-405): Per-seller shipping bars work correctly with proper grouping and individual progress tracking
Both pages correctly check citiesMatch to show appropriate alerts for different city scenarios

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 8 shipping bar features tested and passed

seed_data_creation: Added and removed products via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shipping progress bar implementation is complete and working. Food cart uses localStorage, product cart uses API. Both show orange bar below threshold, green bar at/above threshold. City mismatch alerts work correctly.
